_description: Tests layer 4 type-change + granted activated abilities + trigger cascade. Ygra makes OTHER creatures Food artifacts with '{2},{T},Sac: gain 3 life'. P1 controls Pawpatch Recruit (normally a Rabbit Scout, here also a Food). P1 should be able to activate the granted Food ability on Pawpatch Recruit — {2}, tap, sacrifice -> gain 3 life. When the sacrificed creature dies as a Food, Ygra's trigger fires: +2 +1/+1 counters on Ygra. Common engine bugs: (1) not recognizing non-food creatures as Foods for ability purposes, (2) granted activated ability not appearing as a legal action, (3) missing Ygra's self-trigger because the dying creature's base type isn't Food, (4) Ygra itself (who says 'OTHER creatures') incorrectly self-applying the type change.
